summary: Phase 2 backend + critical frontend integration tested. Backend 23/23 pytest PASS (11 new Phase 2 tests covering admin_pin/balance_level/advanced flags, POST /verify-pin (correct/wrong/no-pin/404), GET /public/tournaments/{id} strips admin_pin, PUT bracket persistence, advanced flag updates). Frontend: end-to-end verified — Crear shows PIN/balance/extra/double/repeats fields; creating w/ admin_pin='1234' → /t/{id}/sorteo triggers PinPrompt; wrong PIN stays locked, correct PIN unlocks (sessionStorage); 'Modo Administrador' badge + Compartir + Ver como espectador toolbar buttons visible; ShareModal opens with /v/{id} URL and QR SVG; /v/{id} viewer page has tabs (Inicio/Jornadas/Tabla/Eliminación), NO sidebar nav, NO edit buttons, 'Acceso administrador' link returns to /t/{id}/sorteo; tournament without admin_pin does not show PinPrompt. Deeper flows (balanced engine extras, match editor, bracket champion, Recharts KPIs) were not exhaustively automated but all required testids and backend support are in place.

minor.issue: Deprecated; migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager (carry-over from prior iterations)
Accepts raw dict payload (no Pydantic model). Works but recommend a VerifyPinRequest model for input validation & 422 on malformed bodies.

ui_bugs.issue: On initial admin unlock, two toast notifications (‘Modo Admin activado’ and ‘PIN incorrecto’) stack in the top-right and visually overlap the Compartir + Ver como espectador + Salir admin buttons until the toasts auto-dismiss (~4-5s). Clicks still register, but it looks like a z-index/positioning collision. Move toasts to top-center or bottom-right, or shift the toolbar buttons down.
Console warning: ‘Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}’. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby for a11y.

issues: Tab data-testids use English ids (viewer-tab-home, viewer-tab-bracket) while visible labels are Spanish (Inicio, Eliminación). Naming is consistent with internal tab state but the review_request example listed inicio/eliminacion. Consider aliasing testids to viewer-tab-inicio / viewer-tab-eliminacion for test scripts that read labels.

action_items: Optional: move toast stack out of top-right to avoid visual collision with Compartir/Ver-como-espectador/Salir-admin buttons.
Optional: add <DialogDescription> to ShareModal and PinPrompt to clear a11y warning.
Optional: introduce a VerifyPinRequest Pydantic model for POST /api/tournaments/{id}/verify-pin.
Optional: align viewer tab data-testids with Spanish ids (inicio/jornadas/tabla/eliminacion) for parity with feature spec.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py GET /public/tournaments/{id}: query excludes admin_pin then re-injects empty string before pydantic validation — works but a dedicated PublicTournament model (without admin_pin) would be cleaner and prevent accidental leakage if validators ever change.
verify_pin response asymmetry: {valid, open} for no-PIN case but {valid} only for PIN case. Consider always returning both keys for consistent client handling.

Tournament model now exceeds ~10 fields with mixed concerns (config, assets, runtime data, bracket). Consider splitting into TournamentConfig + TournamentState in a future refactor — currently OK at ~325 lines.
AppLayout admin-gate logic correctly reads tournament.admin_pin from /api/tournaments/{id} (admin endpoint), not the public one, so the gate cannot be bypassed by hitting the public route. Good.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the Phase 2 critical flows automated (PIN gate, viewer page, share modal, new crear-torneo fields). Match editor, bracket generation, balanced engine extras, and Recharts stats were inspected via code/testids but not exhaustively driven through UI.

test_credentials: N/A — no app auth; admin gate uses per-tournament PIN. Test PIN used: 1234.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted: TEST_Phase2_full, TEST_Phase2_def, TEST_pin_ok, TEST_pin_bad, TEST_pin_none, TEST_public, TEST_bracket, TEST_flags (pytest), TEST_Phase2_UI, TEST_Phase2_share, TEST_no_pin_phase2 (playwright). All cleaned up via DELETE /api/tournaments/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BASE_URL pulled from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (currently https://liga-sorteo-equipos.preview.emergentagent.com — NOT the URL listed in the review_request which was stale). Use that env var, do not hardcode. Phase 2 PIN flow: sessionStorage key esteca_admin_unlocked_v1 → { [tournamentId]: true }. To re-test PIN prompt, open a fresh browser context (page.context.new_page or clear sessionStorage) because once unlocked the modal will not reappear for that tournament. Viewer tab data-testids: viewer-tab-home / viewer-tab-jornadas / viewer-tab-tabla / viewer-tab-bracket (NOT inicio/eliminacion despite the Spanish labels). Untested but worth covering next iteration: (a) 11-team x 6-matches/team balanced engine should auto-generate 3 'Jornada Extra' (33 matches needed vs 30 capacity) — verify via SorteoPage 'Torneo completo' button + JornadasPage 'Extra' badge; (b) MatchEditor scoring updates standings PG/PE/PP/Pts; (c) 'Generar bracket' button + winner propagation + champion banner; (d) EstadisticasPage Recharts BarChart render. Existing test file /app/backend/tests/test_tournament.py covers phase-1 endpoints and still passes — keep it as regression.
rca of the issue: No bugs blocking acceptance. The two minor frontend findings (toast overlap and missing DialogDescription) are cosmetic/a11y polish, not functional blockers.
